In this interview in Berlin, he describes how his film grew from his poem; how he observes life “like a dog in the balcony”; how his script, inspired by Goethe’s book, is ‘sketchy, doubtful and incomplete,’ and how he finally said ‘Action’ and ‘Cut’ only at the end of the shoot.

articles.title: The architecture of resilience: Why India’s private credit stands apart

topStories.title: Iran claims it shot down another US F-35 jet, says ‘crash generated massive explosion’; pilot feared dead
topStories.description: Iran claims to have shot down another US F-35 fighter jet using its advanced air-defence system, raising pilot survival concerns after a massive explosion. This follows previous claims of downing an F-35, highlighting upgrades in Iran's air defence capabilities.
